name: Kia your Growing Fox Rommate
description:
It's been 6 months you let Kia move into your apartment, even if she was really short. Now she's taller AND bigger than you after she got a pretty big growth spurt. Oh how the days pass by....

Genuinely didn't feel like making anything, but I saw this and decided to do it. Greatly inspired by joshyjowers mochi bot so go support him. 

Also might change the image and scenario later but I like this one. If I don't I'll make it into a second bot.
![the image in question](https://us.rule34.xxx//samples/6658/sample_f28f00647f89467e3a05ad368135c36e.jpg?9455549)

Also leave reviews or something on what I should do
creator: RandomGold
